news.title: Air Street becomes one of the largest solo VCs in Europe with $232M fund
news.summary: London’s Air Street Capital has raised a large Fund III with eyes locked on backing early-stage European and North American AI companies.

news.title: Bernie Sanders’ AI ‘gotcha’ video flops, but the memes are great
news.summary: Sen. Bernie Sanders thinks he's tricked Claude into revealing the AI industry's secrets, but he really just exposed how agreeable chatbots can become.

news.title: Vibe-coding startup Lovable is on the hunt for acquisitions
news.summary: Lovable's founder said the fast-growing vibe-coding startup is looking for startups and teams to join its company.

news.title: Apple sets June date for WWDC 2026, teasing ‘AI advancements’
news.summary: Apple will host its next Worldwide Developers Conference the week of June 8. The company is expected to announce major updates to Siri with advanced AI capabilities.

news.title: Startup Gimlet Labs is solving the AI inference bottleneck in a surprisingly elegant way
news.summary: Gimlet Labs just raised an $80 million Series A for tech that lets AI run across NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, ARM, Cerebras and d-Matrix chips, simultaneously.

news.title: Littlebird raises $11M for its AI-assisted ‘recall’ tool that reads your computer screen
news.summary: Littlebird is building an AI that reads your screen in real time to capture context, answer questions, and automate tasks, without relying on screenshots.

news.title: Elizabeth Warren calls Pentagon’s decision to bar Anthropic ‘retaliation’

news.title: Sam Altman-backed fusion startup Helion in talks to sell power to OpenAI
